title: lithocardium excelsum
intro: Lithocardium excelsum, also known as Lithocarpus excelsum, is a species of plant in the beech family Fagaceae, native to eastern Asia. The medicinal properties of Lithocardium excelsum lie in its bark, which is rich in flavonoids and phenolic acids, making it a potential agent for lowering blood pressure and reducing inflammation. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to act as an antioxidant, improving cardiovascular health and reducing the risk of heart disease, as well as its potential to aid in the treatment of various inflammatory conditions. Lithocardium excelsum can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or extracts, which are commonly used in traditional medicine to harness its medicinal properties.
